title: Cofradía Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Cofradía with a Z-Score of +5.34. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cofradía is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 41%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.7 km/h. 
 The heat wave has a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
